hero.heading: Let's build something
hero.subheading: Tell me about your project and I'll get back to you within 24 hours with a clear, honest assessment.

form.heading: Send a message
form.subheading: Fill in the form and I'll reply within 24 hours to schedule a free 30-minute discovery call.
form.messagePlaceholder: What are you building? What problem does it solve? Any specific tech requirements or timeline?
form.errorBanner: Something went wrong. Please try again or reach out directly on WhatsApp.
form.successDesc: Thanks for reaching out — I'll get back to you within 24 hours to schedule our discovery call.
form.nameError: Please enter your name (at least 2 characters)
form.emailError: Please enter a valid email address
form.messageError: Please describe your project (at least 20 characters)

info.whatsappDesc: Fastest response — usually within a few hours
info.emailDesc: For longer briefs, attachments, or formal proposals
info.linkedinDesc: Connect or send a professional message
info.next1Desc: Every inquiry is read personally. I assess the project fit and reply with my honest take — no automated responses.
info.next2Desc: We schedule a free 30-minute call to align on scope, goals, and timeline. No commitment required.
info.next3Desc: You receive a clear, itemised proposal with delivery timeline and pricing — no guesswork, no hidden costs.
